message:
fix: resolve compilation errors in CLI package

- Add missing ratelimit import to spawn.go for RateLimitTracker usage
- Remove duplicate runDirectPaneAssignment stub (real implementation at line 1632)

The stub function at line 779 was superseded by the full implementation
but was never removed, causing "redeclared in this block" error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
